case_title: HANNA ESA VS FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE INS. CO. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $349.83 FILED BY HANNA ESA AS TO DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE INS. CO. GERMAIN NANCY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-29-1992 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HANNA ESA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE INS.
